2026-04-14T16:30:23.3401649Z ---
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3402054Z description: |
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3402609Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3403541Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3404462Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3405002Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3405184Z on:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3406032Z   push:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3406467Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3406909Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3407173Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3407359Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3407637Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3407811Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3408063Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3408244Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3408669Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3409185Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3409583Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3410195Z   noop:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3410623Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3411099Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3411496Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3413117Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3413982Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3414511Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3415015Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3415586Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3416008Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3416455Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3416889Z       steps:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3417316Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3417890Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3418422Z           env:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3419088Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3422912Z           with:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3423353Z             script: |
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3423907Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3424619Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3426530Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3428219Z                 return;
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3428663Z               }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3428908Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3429464Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3430497Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3431095Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3431588Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3434070Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3436974Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3438077Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3524176Z               }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3524474Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3525027Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3525701Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3526236Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3526845Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3527393Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3528735Z               });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3529303Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-14T16:30:23.3648717Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3649155Z   workflow_dispatch:

2026-04-14T16:30:23.3649887Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3650480Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3650753Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3650935Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3651381Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3651878Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3652280Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3652659Z   noop:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3653057Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3653519Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3653897Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3654569Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3655356Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3655827Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3656326Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3656875Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3657304Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3657738Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3658164Z       steps:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3658597Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3659162Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3659675Z           env:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3660583Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3661365Z           with:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3661773Z             script: |
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3662333Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3663031Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3663759Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3664764Z                 return;
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3665196Z               }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3665428Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3665687Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3666449Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3667751Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3668264Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3669918Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3671134Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3672323Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3673000Z               }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3673239Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3673537Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3674188Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3674679Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3675267Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3675777Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3676333Z               });
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3676859Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3677326Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3677491Z tools:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3677871Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3679497Z   github:
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3682348Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3682721Z 
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3682921Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3683575Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3684343Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T16:30:23.3740854Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
